SEARCH
Package gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology

Interface TerminologyLoader

All Known Subinterfaces:
TerminologyMapper
All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultTerminologyMapper
public interface TerminologyLoader
Loads and retrieves FHIR terminology resources (NamingSystem, ConceptMap, CodeSystem, ValueSet).

The default load(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Resource) implementation throws UnsupportedOperationException. Retrieve methods default to returning Optional.empty().

Author:
Audacious Inquiry
See Also:
  • TerminologyMapper

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default Optional<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.CodeSystem>
    getCodeSystem(String id)
    Returns the CodeSystem resource registered under the given identifier.
    default Optional<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.ConceptMap>

    Returns the ConceptMap resource registered under the given identifier.
    default Optional<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.NamingSystem>

    Returns the NamingSystem resource registered under the given identifier.
    default Optional<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.ValueSet>
    getValueSet(String id)
    Returns the ValueSet resource registered under the given identifier.
    default void
    load(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Resource resource)
    Registers a FHIR terminology resource (NamingSystem, ConceptMap, CodeSystem, or ValueSet).

  • Method Details

    • load

      default void load(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Resource resource)
      Registers a FHIR terminology resource (NamingSystem, ConceptMap, CodeSystem, or ValueSet).

      The default implementation throws UnsupportedOperationException. Implementations that support dynamic loading should override this method.

      Parameters:
      resource - the resource to load; must be one of the four supported types
      Throws:
      TerminologyException - if the resource is malformed or cannot be stored
      UnsupportedOperationException - if this loader does not support dynamic loading

    • getNamingSystem

      default Optional<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.NamingSystem> getNamingSystem(String id)
      Returns the NamingSystem resource registered under the given identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - the resource id
      Returns:
      the resource, or Optional.empty() if not found

    • getConceptMap

      default Optional<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.ConceptMap> getConceptMap(String id)
      Returns the ConceptMap resource registered under the given identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - the resource id
      Returns:
      the resource, or Optional.empty() if not found

    • getCodeSystem

      default Optional<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.CodeSystem> getCodeSystem(String id)
      Returns the CodeSystem resource registered under the given identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - the resource id
      Returns:
      the resource, or Optional.empty() if not found

    • getValueSet

      default Optional<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.ValueSet> getValueSet(String id)
      Returns the ValueSet resource registered under the given identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - the resource id
      Returns:
      the resource, or Optional.empty() if not found
